name: int4-mtp-bi0-loopgraph
description: bi0 (int4 W4A16 Gemma-4-E4B target + QAT-matched gemma4_assistant MTP drafter, VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=0 + surgical force-2D TRITON_ATTN patch) PLUS the fa2sw loopgraph (onegraph) CUDA-graph draft replay and fused Triton sparse-argmax, ported onto plain int4 on stock vllm==0.22.0. Both added patches are drafter-only / argmax-preserving (they change how the K-step draft loop is dispatched and how the centroid top-token is computed, never the verifier's emitted token at T=0), so greedy identity / PPL are unchanged vs bi0; only acceptance rate / TPS can move. NOT the osoi5-baked model; plain w4a16-ct weights, same as bi0.
